title: Dimension mismatch in Google Gemini Embedding
symptom: When attempting to upsert data into the Vector Store, n8n throws an error stating 'expected 768 dimensions, not 3072'. This prevents the workflow from executing successfully.
applies_when: Upserting data into Supabase Vector Store
not_this_if: Embedding dimensions match the Vector Store configuration
root_cause: The error occurs because the output dimensions from the Google Gemini model (3072) do not match the expected dimensions configured in the Supabase Vector Store (768). This mismatch leads to a 400 Bad Request error when trying to insert the data.
fix_steps: Update the Supabase Vector Store configuration to accept 3072 dimensions
Ensure that the embedding dimensions in the Google Gemini node are correctly set to match the Vector Store
agent_instruction: Adjust the Supabase Vector Store to use 'vector(3072)' to resolve the dimension mismatch.
